nodes.name: 28.6.story.md
nodes.summary: EPIC-028 Story 28.6 (Complete, Medium-High risk). Create src/ package structure with api/, core/, models/, integrations/ subdirectories and move core files via git mv: main.py → src/api/, ranking_service.py → src/core/, models.py+schemas.py+database.py → src/models/, cfbd_client.py → src/integrations/. Update all import statements across the codebase to use src. prefix. Most significant refactor in the epic.

nodes.name: 28.7.story.md
nodes.summary: EPIC-028 Story 28.7 (Complete). Archive one-off fix_*.py scripts to archive/ directory, move remaining utility scripts to utilities/, apply Black formatter to all Python files, and generate Flake8 lint report documenting remaining violations. Completes the codebase organization and formatting epic.

nodes.name: EPIC-003-DEV-SUMMARY.md
nodes.summary: EPIC-003 development summary for FCS game display feature. Documents completed implementation: FCS games stored with excluded_from_rankings=True flag, displayed on team schedules with gray/muted visual styling, opponent shown as team name or 'FCS Opponent'. Covers all 3 stories (model flag, API import, frontend display) and confirms zero regressions on existing FBS game rankings.

nodes.name: epic-003-fcs-game-display.md
nodes.summary: EPIC-003 definition document for FCS game display. Defines the problem (FCS games excluded from rankings but not visible to users), solution (store with excluded_from_rankings=True, display with visual distinction), and 3 stories: add Game model exclusion flag, import FCS games via CFBD API, and display FCS games on team schedules with grayed-out styling.

nodes.name: preseason-1.1-player-model.md
nodes.summary: Preseason Epic Story 1.1 (Completed). Create Player SQLAlchemy model in src/models/models.py with fields: cfbd_athlete_id, name, team_id (FK), position, stars, rating, ranking, recruiting_year, created_at. Generate and run Alembic migration to add players table. Foundation for position strength preseason calculations.

nodes.name: preseason-1.2-cfbd-player-api.md
nodes.summary: Preseason Epic Story 1.2 (Completed). Add get_recruiting_players() method to CFBDClient in src/integrations/cfbd_client.py, calling the CFBD /recruiting/players endpoint with year and team parameters. Returns list of player dicts with star ratings and position data for importing into the Player model.

nodes.name: preseason-1.3-position-service.md
nodes.summary: Preseason Epic Story 1.3 (Completed). Create src/core/position_service.py with calculate_position_strength() function and position_weights.json config file. Weights: QB=0.30, OL=0.25, DL=0.20, DB=0.15, LB=0.05, RB=0.025, WR=0.025, TE=0.0, ST=0.0. Position scores normalized 0-100, bonus capped at max_bonus. Feature flag enabled=false by default.

nodes.name: preseason-1.4-player-import.md
nodes.summary: Preseason Epic Story 1.4 (Completed). Create utilities/import_player_data.py script with CLI flags --year, --team, --dry-run, --force. Fetches recruiting player data from CFBD API and inserts into Player table, respecting existing records (skip or overwrite with --force). Supports importing one team or all FBS teams for a given year.

nodes.name: preseason-1.5-api-endpoints.md
nodes.summary: Preseason Epic Story 1.5 (Completed). Add two FastAPI endpoints to src/api/main.py: GET /api/teams/{team_id}/players (filtering by recruiting_year, position, pagination via skip/limit, sorted by rating desc) and GET /api/teams/{team_id}/position-strength (returns enabled flag, position_scores, position_bonus, max_bonus, weights, recruiting_year). 18 integration tests created.

nodes.name: preseason-1.6-integration.md
nodes.summary: Preseason Epic Story 1.6 (Completed). Integrate position strength bonus into calculate_preseason_rating() in src/core/ranking_service.py via new _calculate_position_strength_bonus() helper. Feature flag (config['enabled']) gates the bonus; graceful degradation returns 0.0 on disabled/error/missing data. 10 unit tests cover all scenarios. Formula: base + recruiting + transfer + returning + position_strength_bonus.

nodes.name: story-001-games-page-display.md
nodes.summary: EPIC-001 Story 1 (Complete). Update games.html to display all season games including future/scheduled games. Fetches from /api/games endpoint and renders both completed (with scores) and upcoming (with date/time, TBD score) games. Covers full season game list view.

nodes.name: story-002-team-detail-schedule.md
nodes.summary: EPIC-001 Story 2 (Complete). Update team detail page to show full season schedule including future games. Team schedule section fetches from /api/teams/{id}/schedule and renders upcoming games with opponent, date, and predicted outcome alongside completed games with results.

nodes.name: story-003-visual-enhancements.md
nodes.summary: EPIC-001 Story 3 (Complete). Add visual styling to distinguish completed vs scheduled games across the app: completed games show W/L outcome badges with green/red styling, scheduled games show a clock icon and muted styling. CSS additions to frontend styles.

nodes.name: story-004-dynamic-season-detection-utility.md
nodes.summary: EPIC-002 Story 4 (Complete). Create utility functions to auto-detect the current season year and current week from the CFBD API, replacing hardcoded values in import scripts. Implements get_current_season() and get_current_week() in cfbd_client.py using CFBD /games endpoint with status=completed parameter.

nodes.name: story-005-remove-hardcoded-seasons.md
nodes.summary: EPIC-002 Story 5 (Complete). Remove all hardcoded year values (e.g., 2024) from import scripts and replace with dynamic detection using get_current_season(). Affects weekly_update.py, import scripts, and admin trigger endpoints. Eliminates manual year updates between seasons.

nodes.name: story-006-import-validation-completeness.md
nodes.summary: EPIC-002 Story 6 (Complete). Add import validation to check completeness after each weekly import: compare expected game count from CFBD API vs actual imported count, log warnings for missing games, and include completeness report in import output. Helps detect partial import failures.

nodes.name: story-007-game-model-exclusion-flag.md
nodes.summary: EPIC-003 Story 7 (Complete). Add excluded_from_rankings Boolean field (default False) to the Game SQLAlchemy model in src/models/models.py and create corresponding Alembic migration. Enables marking FCS games and other non-ranking games without deleting them from the database.

nodes.name: story-008-fcs-game-import-api.md
nodes.summary: EPIC-003 Story 8 (Complete). Update game import logic in cfbd_client.py to fetch FCS opponent games (where opponent is not an FBS team) and set excluded_from_rankings=True. Update /api/teams/{id}/schedule endpoint to include FCS games in response with is_fcs_opponent flag.

nodes.name: story-009-fcs-frontend-display.md
nodes.summary: EPIC-003 Story 9 (Complete). Display FCS games on team schedule pages with visual distinction: grayed-out/muted styling, 'FCS' label badge, opponent shown as team name or 'FCS Opponent'. Uses CSS .fcs-game class for styling, frontend-only change to team detail JavaScript rendering.

nodes.name: story-ap-comparison-data-fix.md
nodes.summary: Fix story for AP comparison page showing zero values. Root cause: AP poll data was not being imported during weekly updates. Fix imports AP poll rankings from CFBD /rankings endpoint alongside game data, stores in APPoll table, and comparison page correctly displays ELO vs AP Poll accuracy charts.
